creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #3)

Thanks Loïc for the update!

I've created two requests for the upstream, hope that they will fix them so that it will not be necessary to have the custom do-install tag:

https://github.com/pgManage/pgManage/issues/27
https://github.com/pgManage/pgManage/issues/28

Yuri
